[1] Copy
Choose 1 of the Defending Pokémon's attacks. Copy copies that attack. This attack does nothing if Ditto doesn't have the Energy necessary to use that attack. (You must still do anything else required in order to use that attack.)

title: 151 Booster Pack
subtitle: Scarlet & Violet 151
description:
Team up with Bulbasaur, Charmander, and Squirtle, and witness a brand-new dawn in Kanto! With this new day comes a new chance to track down old friends, make new partners, and capture every last one of the original 151. Discover the extraordinary Venusaur ex, Charizard ex, and Blastoise ex in special cards with captivating illustrations, and explore the cities and countryside of a reinvigorated land—you might even find the elusive Mew ex in your travels. New adventures will unfold and new horizons will be revealed in the Scarlet & Violet—151 expansion!

Each pack contains 10 cards.

title: Black Bolt Booster Pack
subtitle: Black Bolt
description:
Scarlet & Violet—Black Bolt

Reunite with the Pokémon of Unova and rise to the top as a Trainer in a land of unity and legends! Evolve first partner Snivy all the way to Serperior ex, and discover the inspiring power of ideals with the region's Legendary and Mythical Pokémon, including Zekrom ex and Meloetta ex. As you fill out your Pokédex, keep an eye out for special illustrations of each Pokémon and parallel cards with Poké Ball patterns in the Pokémon TCG: Scarlet & Violet—Black Bolt expansion!

Each Scarlet & Violet— Black Bolt booster pack contains 10 random cards.

title: White Flare Booster Pack
subtitle: White Flare
description:
Scarlet & Violet—White Flare

Reunite with the Pokémon of Unova and rise to the top as a Trainer in a land of unity and legends! Evolve first partners Tepig and Oshawott all the way to Emboar and Samurott, and discover the undeniable power of truth with the region's Legendary and Mythical Pokémon, including Reshiram ex and Keldeo ex. As you fill out your Pokédex, keep an eye out for special illustrations of each Pokémon and parallel cards with Poké Ball patterns in the Pokémon TCG: Scarlet & Violet—White Flare expansion!

Each Scarlet & Violet— White Flare booster pack contains 10 random cards.v

title: Roronoa Zoro

requirements.label: Effect
requirements.value: [DON!! x1] [Your Turn] All of your Characters gain +1000 power.

subtitle: Romance Dawn (OP-01)
description: A resilient Luffy Character card from the original Romance Dawn set.

requirements.label: Effect
requirements.value: [DON!! x2] This Character cannot be K.O.'d in battle by Strike attribute Characters. [Activate: Main] [Once Per Turn] Give this Character up to 2 rested DON!! cards.

title: Portgas.D.Ace
subtitle: The Time of Battle (OP16)
description: Ace supports Whitebeard Pirate decks while searching key cards.

requirements.label: Effect
requirements.value: The counter of all of your Character cards with 8000 power in your hand becomes +2000. [On Play]/[On K.O.] Look at the top 5 cards of your deck. Reveal up to 1 Monkey.D.Luffy or up to 1 card with a type including Whitebeard Pirates, add it to your hand, then place the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order.

title: Nami
subtitle: Romance Dawn (OP-01)

requirements.label: Effect

requirements.label: Effect

subtitle: Modern Horizons 2
description: Ragavan generates Treasure and steals value with every successful hit.

requirements.label: Effect

title: The One Ring
subtitle: The Lord of the Rings: Tales of Middle-earth
description: An iconic Legendary Artifact that fuels card draw and protection.

requirements.label: Effect
requirements.value: When The One Ring enters, if you cast it, you gain protection from everything until your next turn. {T}: Put a burden counter on The One Ring, then draw a card for each burden counter on it.

title: Doubling Season
subtitle: Wilds of Eldraine: Enchanting Tales
description: Double your tokens and counters with this Commander staple.

requirements.label: Effect
requirements.value: If an effect would create one or more tokens under your control, it creates twice that many instead. If an effect would put counters on a permanent you control, it puts twice that many instead.

subtitle: Core Set 2021
description: Cast spells for free with one of Magic's most powerful enchantments.

requirements.label: Effect
requirements.value: You may cast spells from your hand without paying their mana costs.

requirements.label: Card Text
requirements.value: Mega Zygarde ex Nullifies the Opposition! Boasting greater power than ever before, the Legendary Zygarde surprises the world by becoming a Mega Evolution Pokémon ex! Its strong attacks can decimate your opponent’s strategy by overwhelming their Pokémon with damage. In this collection, you get a ready-to-play foil promo card featuring Mega Zygarde ex, along with an oversize lenticular card and a tech sticker for display. You’ll also find a stack of booster packs from different Pokémon TCG expansions. The Pokémon TCG: Mega Zygarde ex Premium Collection includes: • 1 foil promo card featuring Mega Zygarde ex • 1 oversize lenticular promo card featuring Mega Zygarde ex • 1 tech sticker featuring Mega Zygarde ex • 8 Pokémon TCG booster packs

requirements.label: Card Text
requirements.value: Strike, Slash, and Take Command with Strong Pokémon ex!Adorn your collection with artistic flair in this special collection from the Pokémon TCG: Scarlet & Violet—Shrouded Fable expansion! Inside is a special illustration rare–style promo card featuring one of two Pokémon ex, plus foil cards of their Evolution chain. And with the included Pokémon TCG booster packs, you’re sure to find even more awesome Pokémon for your next battle!The Pokémon TCG: Scarlet & Violet—Shrouded Fable Kingdra ex/Greninja ex Special Illustration Collection includes:• 1 full-art foil promo card featuring Kingdra ex or Greninja ex• 2 foil cards featuring either Horsea and Seadra, or Froakie and Frogadier• 5 Pokémon TCG: Scarlet & Violet—Shrouded Fable booster packs• A code card for Pokémon TCG Live

title: 2-Pack Blister Pack [Team Rocket's Articuno, Zapdos & Tyranitar]

requirements.label: Card Text
requirements.value: Give Your Collection a Boost!Expand your collection with three foil Pokémon TCG cards featuring Team Rocket's Articuno, Team Rocket's Zapdos, and Team Rocket's Tyranitar, plus a metallic coin and two Pokémon TCG booster packs!

requirements.label: Card Text
requirements.value: Discover the Premium Collection of Espeon GX. This collection contains an oversized card of Espeon GX, an alternate art Promo of Espeon GX, collector's pin and coin, and 6 booster packs.

title: Paldean Fates Great Tusk ex & Iron Treads ex Premium Collection
subtitle: SV: Paldean Fates

requirements.label: Card Text
requirements.value: Past & Future Collide with Great Tusk ex & Iron Treads ex!Take a journey into the Great Crater of Paldea and discover Paradox Pokémon that defy the flow of time! Add the brute force of Great Tusk and Iron Treads to your own decks with this collection featuring both of them as Shiny Pokémon ex. You also get two more cards featuring Great Tusk and Iron Treads, plus an oversize foil card featuring Great Tusk ex and 11 booster packs from the special Scarlet & Violet-Paldean Fates expansion.The Pokémon TCG: Great Tusk ex & Iron Treads ex Premium Collection includes:• 2 foil cards featuring Shiny Great Tusk ex and Shiny Iron Treads ex• 2 cards featuring Great Tusk and Iron Treads• 1 oversize foil card featuring Shiny Great Tusk ex• 11 Pokémon TCG: Scarlet & Violet-Paldean Fates booster packs• A code card for Pokémon TCG Live
